allow: Bash(GIT_DIR=".git" GIT_WORK_TREE="." git -c safe.directory="*" fetch origin main)

Bash(GIT_DIR=".git" GIT_WORK_TREE="." git -c safe.directory="*" stash pop)
Bash(GIT_DIR=".git" GIT_WORK_TREE="." git -c safe.directory="*" add docker-compose.yml hitl/server.py)
Bash(GIT_DIR=".git" GIT_WORK_TREE="." git -c safe.directory="*" push -u origin claude/adoring-darwin)
Bash(GIT_DIR=".git" GIT_WORK_TREE="." git -c safe.directory="*" checkout main)
Bash(GIT_DIR=".git" GIT_WORK_TREE="." git -c safe.directory="*" merge claude/adoring-darwin)
Bash(GIT_DIR=".git" GIT_WORK_TREE="." git -c safe.directory="*" push origin main)
